note: The method list covers the core, particles, values and api bindings. Variables like player, victim, shooter and event are real Bukkit/Spigot objects and expose their full Spigot API (https://hub.spigotmc.org/javadocs/spigot/), not only the methods listed here.

bindings.name: core
bindings.description: Main toolbox. Most actions live here: damage, teleport, sounds, projectiles, variables, loops, conditionals.

methods.name: add
methods.description: Adds two numbers. Use it to build a value out of nested calls, like a base plus a scaling part.
methods.keywords: add plus sum total

methods.name: addFireworkEffect
methods.signature: core.addFireworkEffect(Player player, String type, int r, int g, int b)
methods.description: Adds a colored firework effect to a held firework rocket or firework star. type is BALL, BALL_LARGE, STAR, BURST or CREEPER and the burst takes the given RGB color. Does nothing if the held item is not a firework.
methods.keywords: firework rocket star effect color burst dynamic add

methods.name: addItemVariable
methods.signature: core.addItemVariable(Player player, String key, double amount)
methods.description: Adds an amount to a numeric value stored on the held item (counting from 0 if it was never set) and returns the new total. Perfect for upgrade progress like blocks mined or kills.
methods.keywords: item variable increment add counter upgrade progress count level

methods.name: addPotionEffect
methods.signature: core.addPotionEffect(Player player, String type, int durationTicks, int amplifier)
methods.description: Adds a potion effect to a held potion, splash/lingering potion or tipped arrow. type is an effect name like SPEED or STRENGTH, duration is in ticks (20 = 1s), amplifier 0 = level I. Does nothing if the held item has no potion data.
methods.keywords: potion effect tipped arrow brew splash lingering dynamic add buff

methods.name: addToLocation
methods.signature: core.addToLocation(Location location, double x, double y, double z)
methods.description: Returns a new location shifted by the given x, y, z amounts.
methods.keywords: add location world shifted amounts position coords place spot

methods.name: and
methods.description: True only when both conditions are true. Use it to combine two checks without writing code.
methods.keywords: and both combine condition all two

methods.name: balance
methods.description: Returns a player's money balance (requires the Vault plugin).
methods.keywords: balance economy player money requires vault plugin user person

methods.name: breakBlock
methods.description: Breaks a block naturally, dropping its normal loot.
methods.keywords: break block blocks breaks naturally dropping normal loot world terrain

methods.name: breakBlockWithItem
methods.description: Breaks a block naturally as if mined with the given custom item, dropping its loot.
methods.keywords: break block mine custom item drop loot harvest

methods.name: broadcastMessage
methods.description: Broadcasts a message to every player on the server.
methods.keywords: broadcast message messaging broadcasts player server chat text tell notify user person

methods.name: cancelEvent
methods.description: Cancels the current event so the normal action (like the block break or damage) does not happen.
methods.keywords: cancel event logic cancels current normal action block break damage happen stop prevent trigger

methods.name: cast
methods.description: Internal helper that casts an object to another Java type.
methods.keywords: cast java helpers internal helper casts object another type

methods.name: chanceOf
methods.description: Returns true with the given percent chance (0-100). Great for random ability procs.
methods.keywords: chance logic true percent 100 great random ability procs rng roll luck

methods.name: changeBlock
methods.description: Changes a block into the material with the given name.
methods.keywords: change block blocks changes material name world terrain type title display label

methods.name: changeBlockByMaterial
methods.description: Changes a block into the given material.
methods.keywords: change block material blocks changes world terrain type

methods.name: clamp
methods.signature: core.clamp(double value, double low, double high)
methods.description: Keeps a number between a low and a high bound (returns the bound if it is outside the range).
methods.keywords: clamp constrain bound range limit between

methods.name: clearInventory
methods.description: Empties a player's entire inventory.
methods.keywords: clear inventory empties player entire bag slots storage user person

methods.name: cloneLocation
methods.description: Makes a copy of a location so you can change it without affecting the original.
methods.keywords: clone location world copy change without affecting original position coords place spot

methods.name: colorComponent
methods.description: Internal helper that color-codes text and wraps it in a chat component.
methods.keywords: color component java helpers internal helper codes text wraps chat colour rgb hex tint

methods.name: colorComponents
methods.description: Internal helper that color-codes text and wraps it in a chat component array.
methods.keywords: color components java helpers internal helper codes text wraps chat component colour rgb hex

methods.name: colorString
methods.description: Turns & color codes in a piece of text into real Minecraft colors.
methods.keywords: color string messaging turns codes piece text minecraft colors colour rgb hex tint

methods.name: colorStrings
methods.description: Internal helper that color-codes text and wraps it in a string array.
methods.keywords: color strings java helpers internal helper codes text wraps string colour rgb hex tint

methods.name: countNearbyLiving
methods.signature: core.countNearbyLiving(Player player, double x, double y, double z)
methods.description: Counts the living entities (mobs and players, not yourself) in the x, y, z box around the player. Combine with isAtLeast for a scaling condition.
methods.keywords: count nearby living entities number how many targets enemies around amount

methods.name: createAnimation
methods.description: Creates an empty particle animation. Set its orientation (world/yaw/look), anchor (feet/body/eyes/above_head), speed and period, then add layers made with core.createAnimationLayer(). Play it with particles.playAnimation.
methods.keywords: create animation particles empty new orientation anchor speed period layers rune aura halo effect vfx visual builder shape

methods.name: createAnimationLayer
methods.description: Creates one particle animation layer. Set its shape, particle or color1/color2, colorMode, radius, count, spin and more, then add it with animation.getLayers().add(layer).
methods.keywords: create animation layer particles shape particle color rainbow radius count spin phase offset builder rune effect vfx visual

methods.name: createEquationVector
methods.signature: core.createEquationVector(String x, String y, String z)
methods.description: Builds a movement equation (using 't' for time in ticks) that shapes a custom projectile path. Axes are relative to the shooter's facing: X = forward (the way they look), Y = up, Z = left. A normal forward-flying projectile puts the motion on X, e.g. createEquationVector("t * 0.4", "0", "0"); use Y for arc and Z to curve sideways.
methods.keywords: equation path trajectory curve arc spiral wave motion movement vector projectile flight

methods.name: createExplosion
methods.signature: core.createExplosion(World world, double x, double y, double z, int power)
methods.description: Creates an explosion of the given power at the x, y, z position in a world.
methods.keywords: create explosion world creates power position blast boom tnt dimension map

methods.name: createExplosionByLocation
methods.description: Creates an explosion of the given power at a location.
methods.keywords: create explosion location world creates power blast boom tnt position coords place spot

methods.name: createParticle
methods.signature: core.createParticle(World world, double x, double y, double z, ParticleDisplay particle, int speed, int amount, int lastForTicks)
methods.description: Spawns a particle effect at the x, y, z position every tick for the given number of ticks.
methods.keywords: create particle particles spawns effect position tick number ticks vfx visual buff status potion

methods.name: createParticleByLocation
methods.signature: core.createParticleByLocation(Location location, ParticleDisplay particle, int speed, int amount, int lastForTicks)
methods.description: Spawns a particle effect at a location every tick for the given number of ticks.
methods.keywords: create particle location particles spawns effect tick number ticks vfx visual position coords place

methods.name: createRunnable
methods.description: Internal helper that wraps a string of script code into a runnable task.
methods.keywords: create runnable java helpers internal helper wraps string script code task text

methods.name: createRunnableFromBase64
methods.description: Internal helper that decodes Base64 script code into a runnable task.
methods.keywords: create runnable base64 java helpers internal helper decodes script code task

methods.name: createVector
methods.signature: core.createVector(String x, String y, String z)
methods.description: Builds a direction/velocity vector from x, y, z math expressions.
methods.keywords: create vector movement builds direction velocity math expressions motion speed push fling

methods.name: damage
methods.description: Deals the given amount of damage to a living entity (half a heart = 1).
methods.keywords: damage combat deals living entity half heart hurt attack strike mob creature target

methods.name: damageWithAttacker
methods.signature: core.damageWithAttacker(Entity v, double v1, Entity v2)
methods.description: Damages a living entity and credits the damage to an attacker, so kills are attributed correctly.
methods.keywords: damage attacker combat damages living entity credits kills attributed correctly hurt attack strike mob

methods.name: dashForward
methods.signature: core.dashForward(Player player, double power, double lift)
methods.description: Launches the player forward in the direction they are looking, with a horizontal power and an upward lift. Use it for a dash, leap or blink-step.
methods.keywords: dash leap lunge blink forward gust windleap velocity direction

methods.name: deposit
methods.description: Adds money to a player's balance and returns whether it succeeded (requires the Vault plugin).
methods.keywords: deposit economy adds money player balance whether succeeded requires vault plugin user person

methods.name: disableFly
methods.description: Stops a player from flying.
methods.keywords: disable fly movement stops player flying user person

methods.name: divide
methods.description: Divides the first number by the second (returns 0 if dividing by zero).
methods.keywords: divide division ratio quotient

methods.name: doIf
methods.description: Runs a piece of script code only if the condition is true.
methods.keywords: logic runs piece script code condition true

methods.name: doIfElse
methods.signature: core.doIfElse(boolean condition, String action, String elseAction)
methods.description: Runs one piece of script code if the condition is true, otherwise runs the other piece.
methods.keywords: logic runs piece script code condition true otherwise

methods.name: dropItem
methods.description: Drops an item on the ground at a location.
methods.keywords: drop drops ground location spawn throw position coords place spot

methods.name: dropItemByMaterial
methods.description: Drops the given material on the ground at a location.
methods.keywords: drop material drops ground location spawn throw block type position coords place spot

methods.name: enableFly
methods.description: Lets a player fly.
methods.keywords: enable fly movement lets player user person

methods.name: evalFromCharCode
methods.description: Internal helper that builds script code from character codes and runs it.
methods.keywords: eval char code java helpers internal helper builds script character codes runs

methods.name: executeCommand
methods.description: Makes a player run a command as if they typed it in chat.
methods.keywords: execute command players player run typed chat user person

methods.name: freeze
methods.description: Freezes an entity in place for the given duration (in ticks) by keeping it at its current spot.
methods.keywords: freeze movement freezes entity place duration ticks keeping current spot frozen stop hold immobile

methods.name: fromCharCode
methods.description: Internal helper that builds a string from a list of character codes.
methods.keywords: char code java helpers internal helper builds string character codes text

methods.name: getBlockAt
methods.signature: core.getBlockAt(World world, int x, int y, int z)
methods.description: Gets the block at the given x, y, z coordinates in a world.
methods.keywords: block blocks coordinates world terrain dimension map

methods.name: getBlockAtByLocation
methods.description: Gets the block at a given location.
methods.keywords: block location blocks world terrain position coords place spot

methods.name: getBlocksInRadius
methods.signature: core.getBlocksInRadius(Location startLoc, int x, int y, int z)
methods.description: Returns all blocks in a box around a location, reaching the given distance on each axis.
methods.keywords: blocks radius box location reaching distance axis range area position coords place spot

methods.name: getBoots
methods.description: Returns the boots a player is wearing.
methods.keywords: boots player wearing user person

methods.name: getChestplate
methods.description: Returns the chestplate a player is wearing.
methods.keywords: chestplate player wearing user person

methods.name: getClassByName
methods.description: Internal helper that loads a Java class by its full name.
methods.keywords: class name java helpers internal helper loads full title display label

methods.name: getCurrentTimeMs
methods.description: Returns the current system time in milliseconds, handy for cooldowns.
methods.keywords: current time ms utility system milliseconds handy cooldowns clock day night

methods.name: getEntityById
methods.description: Finds an entity in a world by its numeric entity id, or nothing if not found.
methods.keywords: entity id entities finds world numeric nothing found mob creature target dimension map

methods.name: getEntityByUUID
methods.description: Finds an entity in a world by its UUID text, or nothing if not found.
methods.keywords: entity uuid entities finds world text nothing found mob creature target dimension map

methods.name: getEyeLocation
methods.description: Returns the location of a living entity's eyes (their head, where they are looking from).
methods.keywords: eye location entities living entity eyes head where looking position coords place spot mob

methods.name: getGlobalVariable
methods.description: Reads a global (server-wide) saved variable by name, creating it empty if it does not exist.
methods.keywords: global variable variables reads server wide saved name creating empty exist data store save

methods.name: getHelmet
methods.description: Returns the helmet a player is wearing.
methods.keywords: helmet player wearing user person

methods.name: getIndex
methods.description: Internal helper that finds the position of an item in an array, or -1 if not found.
methods.keywords: index java helpers internal helper finds position found

methods.name: getItemBySlot
methods.description: Returns the item in a specific inventory slot of a player.
methods.keywords: slot specific inventory player bag slots storage user person

methods.name: getItemCooldownRemaining
methods.description: Returns how many ticks of vanilla cooldown are left on the item that triggered this ability (20 ticks = 1 second), or 0 if it is ready.
methods.keywords: cooldown remaining ticks left item time vanilla armor armour worn

methods.name: getItemStack
methods.description: Builds the actual in-game ItemStack for one of your custom items.
methods.keywords: stack builds actual game itemstack custom special

methods.name: getItemStatValue
methods.description: Returns the value of one of a custom item's stats by name, or 0 if the item does not have it.
methods.keywords: stat custom stats name attribute special attributes title display label

methods.name: getItemVariable
methods.description: Reads a value stored on the player's held item with setItemVariable. Returns nothing if the item has no such value.
methods.keywords: item variable nbt read per item state level get tag

methods.name: getItemVariableNumber
methods.description: Reads a value stored on the held item as a number (0 if it was never set or is not a number). Use it to do math with item variables like a kill or soul counter.
methods.keywords: item variable number read numeric counter souls level double

methods.name: getItemVariableOrDefault
methods.signature: core.getItemVariableOrDefault(Player player, String key, Object def)
methods.description: Reads a value stored on the held item, or returns the given default if it was never set.
methods.keywords: item variable default fallback read

methods.name: getLeggings
methods.description: Returns the leggings a player is wearing.
methods.keywords: leggings player wearing user person

methods.name: getLocation
methods.signature: core.getLocation(World world, double x, double y, double z)
methods.description: Builds a location object from a world and x, y, z coordinates.
methods.keywords: location world builds object coordinates position coords place spot dimension map

methods.name: getMaterial
methods.description: Looks up a Minecraft material (block or item type) by its name.
methods.keywords: material looks minecraft block type name world terrain title display label

methods.name: getNearbyEntities
methods.signature: core.getNearbyEntities(Entity player, double v, double v1, double v2)
methods.description: Returns all entities near an entity (player, victim, or any mob) within the given x, y, z distances.
methods.keywords: nearby entities entity player victim mob within distances radius area creature target user person

methods.name: getNearbyLivingEntities
methods.signature: core.getNearbyLivingEntities(Entity player, double v, double v1, double v2)
methods.description: Returns only the LIVING entities near an entity (players and mobs) within the given x, y, z distances. Skips dropped items, arrows, xp orbs and other non-living entities, so area effects only hit real targets.
methods.keywords: nearby living entities mobs players target area aoe exclude items drops

methods.name: getPlayerByName
methods.description: Finds an online player by their name, or returns nothing if they are offline.
methods.keywords: player name players finds online nothing offline user person title display label

methods.name: getPlayerByUUID
methods.description: Finds an online player by their UUID.
methods.keywords: player uuid players finds online user person

methods.name: getPlayerByUUIDString
methods.description: Finds an online player by their UUID written as text.
methods.keywords: player uuid string players finds online written text user person

methods.name: getPlayerStatValue
methods.description: Returns the value of one of a player's custom stats by name.
methods.keywords: player stat players custom stats name user person attribute special attributes title display label

methods.name: getPlayerVariable
methods.signature: core.getPlayerVariable(Player player, String variable, boolean temp)
methods.description: Reads a saved variable stored on a player, creating it empty if missing (use temp=true for variables cleared on logout).
methods.keywords: player variable variables reads saved stored creating empty missing temp true cleared logout user

methods.name: getPlayerVariableOrDefault
methods.signature: core.getPlayerVariableOrDefault(Player player, String variable, Object def, boolean temp)
methods.description: Reads a player's saved variable, or sets and returns a default value if it does not exist yet.
methods.keywords: player variable default variables reads saved sets exist yet user person data store save

methods.name: getSound
methods.description: Looks up a Minecraft sound by its name.
methods.keywords: sound looks minecraft name audio sfx noise title display label

methods.name: getSpecialVariable
methods.description: Internal helper that reads a special built-in variable attached to the current event.
methods.keywords: special variable java helpers internal helper reads built attached current event data store save

methods.name: getType
methods.description: Returns the material (type) of a block.
methods.keywords: type blocks material block world terrain

methods.name: getUsingIndex
methods.description: Internal helper that returns the item at a position in an array.
methods.keywords: index java helpers internal helper position

methods.name: getVariableFromEvent
methods.description: Internal helper that reads a custom variable attached to the current event.
methods.keywords: variable event java helpers internal helper reads custom attached current data store save nbt

methods.name: getWorld
methods.description: Gets a world by its name, or nothing if no world has that name.
methods.keywords: world name nothing dimension map title display label

methods.name: giveCustomItem
methods.signature: core.giveCustomItem(Player player, String id, int amount)
methods.description: Gives the player a fresh copy of a custom ItemsCore item by its id, amount times. Each copy is brand new and unique. Use it to hand out rewards from a voucher or crate.
methods.keywords: give custom item id voucher reward crate grant prize copy

methods.name: giveEffect
methods.signature: core.giveEffect(LivingEntity player, String effect, int duration, int amplifier, boolean ambient, boolean particles)
methods.description: Gives a living entity a potion effect for a duration (in ticks) at the given strength level. Works on the player, a victim, or any mob.
methods.keywords: effect effects living entity potion duration ticks strength level works player victim mob buff

methods.name: giveItem
methods.description: Gives a player one of the given material as an item.
methods.keywords: player material user person block type

methods.name: groundSmash
methods.signature: core.groundSmash(Location center, int radius, double power)
methods.description: Erupts the floor: turns the solid blocks one layer under the center into real falling blocks in a square of the given radius, launching them upward with the given power so they arc up and drop back into place. Works on every version. Great to call at a projectile's hit location.
methods.keywords: ground smash blocks erupts floor turns solid layer center falling square radius launching upward

methods.name: hasId
methods.description: Checks whether an item is a custom ItemsCore item with the given id.
methods.keywords: id checks whether custom itemscore special

methods.name: hasItemCooldown
methods.description: Returns true while the item that triggered this ability (held, or the worn armour piece) is still on a vanilla cooldown from setItemCooldown. Use it to block an action until the cooldown ends.
methods.keywords: cooldown check has item on cooldown ready vanilla armor armour worn

methods.name: hasNearbyLiving
methods.signature: core.hasNearbyLiving(Player player, double x, double y, double z)
methods.description: True when at least one living entity (mob or player, not yourself) is in the x, y, z box around the player. Use it to check for a target before an ability with no code.
methods.keywords: has nearby living entity target enemy mob present any condition around

methods.name: heal
methods.description: Heals a living entity by the given amount, capped at its max health (half a heart = 1). Works on the player, a victim, or any mob.
methods.keywords: heal combat heals living entity capped max health half heart works player victim mob

methods.name: hidePlayer
methods.description: Hides a player so no other online player can see them.
methods.keywords: hide player players hides online see user person

methods.name: hidePlayerDuration
methods.description: Hides a player from everyone, then makes them visible again after the given number of ticks.
methods.keywords: hide player duration players hides everyone visible after number ticks user person

methods.name: isAtLeast
methods.description: True when the first number is at least (greater than or equal to) the second.
methods.keywords: at least greater equal minimum compare condition number atleast

methods.name: isAtMost
methods.description: True when the first number is at most (less than or equal to) the second.
methods.keywords: at most less equal maximum compare condition number atmost

methods.name: isEqual
methods.description: True when two numbers are equal.
methods.keywords: equal equals same compare condition number

methods.name: isGreater
methods.description: True when the first number is greater than the second. Use it as a doIf condition instead of writing raw code.
methods.keywords: greater more than bigger compare condition number above

methods.name: isHealthBelowPercent
methods.description: True when the player's health is below the given fraction of their maximum (0.3 = below 30%). Great for a low-health proc with no code.
methods.keywords: health below percent low hp fraction condition hurt danger threshold

methods.name: isItemVariableAtLeast
methods.signature: core.isItemVariableAtLeast(Player player, String key, double amount)
methods.description: True when a numeric value stored on the held item is at least the given amount. Reads with getItemVariableNumber. Use it for a charge or soul counter condition with no code.
methods.keywords: item variable at least counter souls charge condition number atleast enough

methods.name: isItemVariableAtMost
methods.signature: core.isItemVariableAtMost(Player player, String key, double amount)
methods.description: True when a numeric value stored on the held item is at most the given amount. The mirror of isItemVariableAtLeast, for an empty/low counter condition.
methods.keywords: item variable at most counter souls empty low condition number atmost

methods.name: isLess
methods.description: True when the first number is less than the second.
methods.keywords: less smaller below under compare condition number

methods.name: isNull
methods.description: Internal helper that checks whether a value is empty (null).
methods.keywords: null java helpers internal helper checks whether empty

methods.name: isStandingStill
methods.description: True when the player is barely moving (standing still). Use it to gate an effect that only runs while still, with no velocity math.
methods.keywords: standing still not moving idle stationary still motionless velocity condition

methods.name: isTalisman
methods.description: Checks whether a custom item is a talisman (a passive item kept in the inventory).
methods.keywords: talisman checks whether custom passive kept inventory special bag slots storage

methods.name: isWearingFullSet
methods.description: True when the player is wearing all four armour pieces of a set, matched by id prefix (e.g. "spirit" matches spirit_helmet, spirit_chestplate, spirit_leggings, spirit_boots). Perfect for a full-set bonus condition with no code.
methods.keywords: wearing full set armor armour bonus four pieces helmet chestplate leggings boots matching suit complete

methods.name: killEntity
methods.description: Removes an entity from the world (kills it without drops).
methods.keywords: kill entity entities removes world kills without drops mob creature target dimension map

methods.name: knockback
methods.signature: core.knockback(Entity entity, Location from, double multiplier)
methods.description: Knocks an entity away from a location, with extra strength set by the multiplier.
methods.keywords: knockback combat knocks entity away location extra strength set multiplier push throw launch shove

methods.name: knockbackNearbyLiving
methods.signature: core.knockbackNearbyLiving(Player player, double x, double y, double z, double strength)
methods.description: Knocks back every living entity in the x, y, z box around the player, away from the player, at the given strength. Skips the player.
methods.keywords: knockback repel push away nearby living aoe shockwave

methods.name: lightningNearbyLiving
methods.signature: core.lightningNearbyLiving(Player player, double x, double y, double z)
methods.description: Strikes every living entity in the x, y, z box around the player with lightning. Skips the player.
methods.keywords: lightning bolt strike chain storm nearby living aoe thunder

methods.name: loop
methods.signature: core.loop(String action, int totalTimes, int period)
methods.description: Repeatedly runs a piece of script code a set number of times, waiting the given ticks between each run (-1 times means forever). The current loop number is available as tIndex.
methods.keywords: loop loops repeatedly runs piece script code set number times waiting ticks between run

methods.name: loopThrough
methods.signature: core.loopThrough(String action, Object[] array, int period)
methods.description: Runs a piece of script code once for each item in an array, with the current item available as currentArrayObject.
methods.keywords: loop through loops runs piece script code once current available currentarrayobject repeat iterate foreach

methods.name: max
methods.description: Returns the larger of two numbers.
methods.keywords: max maximum larger floor higher

methods.name: min
methods.description: Returns the smaller of two numbers. Use it to cap a value, e.g. spend at most a limit of a counter.
methods.keywords: min minimum smaller cap limit lower clamp

methods.name: morphHeldItem
methods.description: Changes how the player's held item LOOKS by swapping its material, while it stays the exact same custom item (same id, lore and behavior) - it is now Morphed. The original material is remembered so unmorphHeldItem can restore it.
methods.keywords: morph material change appearance disguise look transform skin dynamic block reskin

methods.name: multiply
methods.description: Multiplies two numbers. Use it to scale an amount, like souls times a damage-per-soul value.
methods.keywords: multiply times scale product

methods.name: newPlayerHead
methods.description: Creates a new player head item showing the given player's skin.
methods.keywords: player head creates showing skin user person

methods.name: not
methods.description: Flips a true/false value. Use it to run something when a condition is NOT met.
methods.keywords: not negate flip invert opposite false condition

methods.name: onlinePlayers
methods.description: Returns the list of all players currently online on the server.
methods.keywords: online players currently server

methods.name: or
methods.description: True when either condition is true.
methods.keywords: or either combine condition any

methods.name: parsePlaceholder
methods.description: Replaces PlaceholderAPI placeholders in text with their real values for a player.
methods.keywords: parse placeholder utility replaces placeholderapi placeholders text player user person

methods.name: playSound
methods.signature: core.playSound(Player player, Location location, Sound sound, double volume, double pitch)
methods.description: Plays a sound to a player at a location with the given volume and pitch.
methods.keywords: play sound plays player location volume pitch start trigger audio sfx noise user person

methods.name: playerHead
methods.description: Sets an existing player-head item to show the given player's skin.
methods.keywords: player head sets existing show skin user person

methods.name: projectileItem
methods.description: Builds an item projectile body from a material name, handy for flinging a block or any item as an ITEM projectile. Same chainable styling as the ItemStack version (small/visible/marker/rotation/spin/trail).
methods.keywords: projectile projectiles builds body material name handy flinging block chainable styling itemstack version small

methods.name: projectileItem
methods.description: Builds an item projectile body: an invisible armor stand wearing the given item on its head. Pass it as the val of shootProjectile with type ITEM. Chain small(true) for a small stand, visible(true) to show the stand, marker(false) to give it a hitbox, rotation(x, y, z) to tilt the item in degrees, spin(degreesPerTick) to make it spin while it flies, trail(particleDisplay) to leave a particle trail, and trailEvery(ticks) to thin that trail out.
methods.keywords: projectile projectiles builds body invisible armor stand wearing head pass val shootprojectile type chain

methods.name: pullNearbyLiving
methods.signature: core.pullNearbyLiving(Player player, double x, double y, double z, double strength)
methods.description: Pulls every living entity in the x, y, z box around the player toward the player at the given strength. Skips the player. Great for a black-hole or vacuum ability with no looping code.
methods.keywords: pull vacuum gravity attract suck blackhole nearby living aoe vortex

methods.name: randomFromList
methods.description: Picks one random entry from a comma separated list (or a real list) and returns it. Roll a random reward, message or command with it.
methods.keywords: random pick list reward roll choose element voucher crate prize loot

methods.name: randomInt
methods.description: Returns a random whole number between min and max, both included.
methods.keywords: random number int range roll dice min max amount

methods.name: refreshItemLore
methods.description: Redraws the held item's lore from its template, filling in placeholders like {var_level} with the values stored on that item. Call it after changing an item variable so the lore updates live. Write {var_yourKey} in the item's lore in the editor.
methods.keywords: lore dynamic refresh placeholder update item variable upgrade text redraw

methods.name: removeBlock
methods.description: Turns a block into air, making it disappear without drops.
methods.keywords: remove block blocks turns air disappear without drops world terrain

methods.name: removeBlocks
methods.description: Removes a whole list of blocks at once, turning them all to air.
methods.keywords: remove blocks removes once turning air

methods.name: removeHeldItem
methods.description: Removes one of the item the player is currently holding from their hand.
methods.keywords: remove held removes player currently holding hand user person

methods.name: runCode
methods.description: Runs a piece of script code right now.
methods.keywords: run code logic runs piece script right now

methods.name: runCodeLater
methods.description: Runs a piece of script code after a delay measured in ticks (20 ticks = 1 second).
methods.keywords: run code later logic runs piece script after delay measured ticks 20 second

methods.name: runRunnable
methods.description: Internal helper that runs an already-built runnable task immediately.
methods.keywords: run runnable java helpers internal helper runs already built task immediately

methods.name: runRunnableLater
methods.description: Runs an already-built runnable (from core.createRunnable) after a delay measured in ticks (20 ticks = 1 second). Prefer this over runCodeLater so the runnable is compiled once instead of evaluating a code string at runtime.
methods.keywords: run runnable later delay schedule ticks delayed task after wait timer createrunnable

methods.name: runUntil
methods.signature: core.runUntil(String code, String conditionCode, int period)
methods.description: Keeps running a piece of script code every few ticks while a condition stays true.
methods.keywords: run until loops keeps running piece script code few ticks while condition stays true

methods.name: sendColorMessage
methods.description: Sends a chat message to one player, supporting & color codes and hex (&#rrggbb).
methods.keywords: send color message messaging sends chat player supporting codes hex rrggbb colour rgb tint

methods.name: setGamemode
methods.description: Changes a player's game mode (survival, creative, adventure, spectator).
methods.keywords: set gamemode players changes player game mode survival creative adventure spectator user person

methods.name: setGlobalVariable
methods.description: Saves a global (server-wide) variable by name so it persists and can be read later.
methods.keywords: set global variable variables saves server wide name persists read later data store save

methods.name: setHealth
methods.description: Sets a living entity's health to an exact amount (half a heart = 1). Works on the player, a victim, or any mob.
methods.keywords: set health combat sets living entity exact half heart works player victim mob hp

methods.name: setHook
methods.signature: core.setHook(String as, String jarName, String groupId, String artifactId)
methods.description: Internal helper that registers an external plugin jar as a hook usable from scripts.
methods.keywords: set hook java helpers internal helper registers external plugin jar usable scripts

methods.name: setInIndex
methods.signature: core.setInIndex(Object[] array, Object obj, int index)
methods.description: Internal helper that stores an item at a position in an array.
methods.keywords: set index java helpers internal helper stores position

methods.name: setItemCooldown
methods.description: Puts a real vanilla cooldown on the item that triggered this ability (the held item, or the worn armour piece for an armour ability) for the given number of seconds. Held items grey out with the sweeping overlay, exactly like an ender pearl; worn armour cannot show the overlay, so gate armour abilities with the action's own cooldown field instead. Needs Minecraft 1.11 or newer.
methods.keywords: cooldown item vanilla visual timer ender pearl grey sweep delay reuse use armor armour piece worn

methods.name: setItemVariable
methods.signature: core.setItemVariable(Player player, String key, Object value)
methods.description: Stores a value on the player's held item itself (not the player). The value travels with that exact item even when it is moved, dropped or traded. Use it for per item state like an upgrade level or a kill counter. Returns the updated item.
methods.keywords: item variable nbt data store per item upgrade level state set tag

methods.name: setLeatherColor
methods.signature: core.setLeatherColor(Player player, int r, int g, int b)
methods.description: Dyes the held leather armor piece the given RGB color (each 0-255). Does nothing if the held item is not leather armor. Updates the look live, like a morph.
methods.keywords: leather armor color dye rgb tint dynamic recolor

methods.name: setLeatherColorHex
methods.description: Dyes the held leather armor piece from a hex color like #ff0000. Does nothing if the held item is not leather armor.
methods.keywords: leather armor color dye hex tint dynamic recolor

methods.name: setPlayerVariable
methods.signature: core.setPlayerVariable(Player player, String variable, Object value, boolean temp)
methods.description: Saves a variable on a player (use temp=true for variables cleared when they log out).
methods.keywords: set player variable variables saves temp true cleared log user person data store save

methods.name: setRotation
methods.signature: core.setRotation(Entity entity, float y, float p)
methods.description: Turns an entity to face the given yaw and pitch without moving it.
methods.keywords: set rotation movement turns entity face yaw pitch without moving mob creature target

methods.name: setVelocity
methods.signature: core.setVelocity(Entity player, String x, String y, String z)
methods.description: Pushes an entity (player, victim, or any mob) using x, y, z math expressions as the velocity direction and strength.
methods.keywords: set velocity movement pushes entity player victim mob math expressions direction strength speed motion

methods.name: setVelocityByVector
methods.description: Pushes an entity (player, victim, or any mob) using a ready-made velocity vector.
methods.keywords: set velocity vector movement pushes entity player victim mob ready made speed motion push

methods.name: shootArrow
methods.description: Makes a living entity shoot an arrow in the direction it is looking.
methods.keywords: shoot arrow projectiles living entity direction looking projectile bolt shot mob creature target

methods.name: shootProjectile
methods.signature: core.shootProjectile(Player player, Location location, String type, Object val, int timeAliveTicks, boolean splashHit, EquationVector equationVector)
methods.description: Internal legacy string-typed projectile call kept so older items keep working; new items use the ProjectileType enum.
methods.keywords: shoot projectile java helpers internal legacy string typed call kept older keep working projectiletype

methods.name: shootProjectile
methods.signature: core.shootProjectile(Player player, Location location, ProjectileType type, Object val, int timeAliveTicks, boolean splashHit, EquationVector equationVector)
methods.description: Fires a custom ItemsCore projectile from a player. The type is one of PARTICLE or ITEM, val is the body to fly (a ParticleDisplay, or a projectileItem(...) for ITEM), timeAliveTicks is how long it lives, splashHit keeps it going through entities, and the last argument is the flight path from createEquationVector.
methods.keywords: shoot fire launch projectile arrow missile spell bullet throw cast beam

methods.name: showPlayer
methods.description: Makes a hidden player visible to everyone again.
methods.keywords: show player players hidden visible everyone user person

methods.name: showPlayerDuration
methods.description: Makes a player visible to everyone, then hides them again after the given number of ticks.
methods.keywords: show player duration players visible everyone hides after number ticks user person

methods.name: skullOwner
methods.description: Creates a player-head item showing the skin of the given player name.
methods.keywords: skull owner creates player head showing skin name user person title display label

methods.name: skullTexture
methods.description: Creates a player-head item from a base64 skin texture value (the kind sites like minecraft-heads give you).
methods.keywords: skull texture creates player head base64 skin kind sites minecraft heads user person

methods.name: skullTextureSigned
methods.description: Creates a player-head item from a base64 skin texture and its Mojang signature, for verified skins that need both.
methods.keywords: skull texture signed creates player head base64 skin mojang signature verified skins need both

methods.name: splashDamage
methods.signature: core.splashDamage(LivingEntity player, double damage, double x, double y, double z)
methods.description: Damages every entity near the given entity (except itself) within the given x, y, z range. The center can be the player, a victim, or any mob.
methods.keywords: splash damage combat damages entity except itself within range center player victim mob hurt

methods.name: splashDamageAtLocation
methods.signature: core.splashDamageAtLocation(Location center, double damage, double x, double y, double z, Entity attacker)
methods.description: Deals splash damage to every living entity within the given x, y, z box around a location, crediting the attacker. Built for throwBlocks landing callbacks using landLocation.
methods.keywords: splash damage location combat deals living entity within box crediting attacker built throwblocks landing

methods.name: subtract
methods.description: Subtracts the second number from the first.
methods.keywords: subtract minus difference

methods.name: subtractItemVariable
methods.signature: core.subtractItemVariable(Player player, String key, double amount)
methods.description: Subtracts an amount from a numeric value stored on the held item and returns the new total. The mirror of addItemVariable, for spending a counter.
methods.keywords: item variable subtract spend counter souls cost decrement

methods.name: summonEntity
methods.signature: core.summonEntity(World world, String type, double x, double y, double z)
methods.description: Spawns an entity of the given type at the x, y, z position and returns its UUID as text.
methods.keywords: summon entity entities spawns type position uuid text mob creature target

methods.name: summonLightning
methods.signature: core.summonLightning(World world, double x, double y, double z)
methods.description: Strikes lightning at the given x, y, z position in a world.
methods.keywords: summon lightning world strikes position thunder bolt strike storm dimension map

methods.name: summonLightningByLocation
methods.description: Strikes lightning at a location.
methods.keywords: summon lightning location world strikes thunder bolt strike storm position coords place spot

methods.name: teleport
methods.signature: core.teleport(Entity entity, double x, double y, double z)
methods.description: Teleports an entity to the given x, y, z in its current world (keeps its facing direction).
methods.keywords: teleport movement teleports entity current world keeps facing direction tp warp move blink mob

methods.name: teleportForward
methods.signature: core.teleportForward(LivingEntity player, double range, boolean skipBlocks)
methods.description: Dashes a living entity forward in the direction it is looking, up to the given range (skipBlocks=true lets it pass through walls).
methods.keywords: teleport forward movement dashes living entity direction looking range skipblocks true lets pass through

methods.name: teleportToEntity
methods.description: Teleports one entity directly to another entity's position.
methods.keywords: teleport entity movement teleports directly another position tp warp move blink mob creature target

methods.name: teleportToLocation
methods.description: Teleports an entity to a specific location.
methods.keywords: teleport location movement teleports entity specific tp warp move blink position coords place spot

methods.name: throwBlocks
methods.signature: core.throwBlocks(Entity source, int radius, int depth, double forward, double up, double spread, String onLand)
methods.description: Block animation: rips the solid blocks in a square (radius) and depth (layers) under the source out of the ground and hurls them as real falling blocks forward in the direction the source faces, with an upward and a random spread component. The blocks vanish where they land instead of placing. Pass onLand script code (with landLocation, and player when the source is a player, available) to run an effect at each landing spot, or an empty string for none.
methods.keywords: throw blocks block animation rips solid square radius depth layers source ground hurls falling

methods.name: throwIsland
methods.signature: core.throwIsland(Entity source, int radius, int depth, double forward, double up, String onLand)
methods.description: Block animation (entity-relative): copies the solid blocks in a square (radius) and depth (layers) under the entity and lobs that whole patch as one moving island of real falling blocks in the direction the entity faces (forward) with an upward push (up), then it falls back down under gravity. The ground stays intact. Runs the onLand script once at the landing spot (landLocation, and player when the source is a player, are available). Keep forward and up small for a slow lob. For throws not tied to a player position use the location overload throwIsland(location, ...) or throwIslandOf(...).
methods.keywords: throw island block falling debris launch terrain ground earthquake

methods.name: throwIsland
methods.signature: core.throwIsland(Location center, int radius, int depth, double vx, double vy, double vz, String onLand)
methods.description: Block animation (free): copies the solid blocks in a square (radius) and depth (layers) at and below the given center location and lobs that patch as one moving island of real falling blocks with the exact world velocity (vx, vy, vz), then it falls under gravity. Not tied to any player or facing, so the center and direction are entirely yours. The original ground stays intact. Runs onLand once at the landing spot (landLocation, and player if it is in scope, are available). If the center is mid-air with no blocks below it nothing is thrown - use throwIslandOf to build the island from a chosen material instead.
methods.keywords: throw island block falling debris launch terrain location velocity

methods.name: throwIslandOf
methods.signature: core.throwIslandOf(Location center, String material, int radius, int depth, double vx, double vy, double vz, String onLand)
methods.description: Block animation (built from a material): spawns a square (radius) and depth (layers) island made of the given block material at the center location (no terrain needed, so it works in mid-air or anywhere) and lobs it as one moving group of real falling blocks with the world velocity (vx, vy, vz), then it falls under gravity. Runs onLand once at the landing spot (landLocation, and player if it is in scope, are available). Unknown materials fall back to STONE.
methods.keywords: throw island block falling debris launch material meteor skyfall

methods.name: toArray
methods.description: Turns a list (like getNearbyLivingEntities) into an array so you can pass it straight to loopThrough, with no .toArray() code.
methods.keywords: to array list convert loop through nearby entities collection toarray

methods.name: toClass
methods.description: Internal helper that loads a Java class type by its full name.
methods.keywords: class java helpers internal helper loads type full name title display label

methods.name: toString
methods.description: Internal helper that turns any object into its text form.
methods.keywords: string java helpers internal helper turns object text form

methods.name: unmorphHeldItem
methods.description: Restores a morphed held item back to the original material it had before morphHeldItem. Does nothing if the item was never morphed.
methods.keywords: unmorph restore material revert original appearance reset demorph

methods.name: veinMine
methods.signature: core.veinMine(BlockBreakEvent event, Item item, int maxBlocks, int maxBox)
methods.description: Vein-mines straight from a block break event, shattering the rest of the connected vein around the block that was just broken. Same as veinMine on a block but takes the event so you can call it directly inside a block break handler.
methods.keywords: vein miner ore connected break event blockbreak chain excavate pickaxe mining

methods.name: veinMine
methods.signature: core.veinMine(Block start, Item item, int maxBlocks, int maxBox)
methods.description: Breaks the whole connected vein of blocks around a block you just mined, as if each one was mined with the given item so it drops its loot. Only blocks that share the start block's material are taken, the start block itself is left to whatever broke it, and the search stops at maxBlocks blocks or once the vein spans maxBox blocks across in any direction. Returns how many extra blocks were broken.
methods.keywords: vein miner ore connected flood fill break chain excavate cluster pickaxe mining tunnel

methods.name: waitUntil
methods.signature: core.waitUntil(String code, String conditionCode, int period, int safe)
methods.description: Waits until a condition becomes true, then runs a piece of script code (the safe value limits how long it waits).
methods.keywords: wait until loops waits condition becomes true runs piece script code safe limits how

methods.name: withdraw
methods.description: Removes money from a player's balance and returns whether it succeeded (requires the Vault plugin).
methods.keywords: withdraw economy removes money player balance whether succeeded requires vault plugin user person

methods.name: playAnimation

methods.name: playAnimationAt

methods.description: Draws a multi-colored rainbow arc of particles at the display's location.
methods.keywords: rainbow particle shapes draws multi colored arc particles display location effect vfx visual position

methods.name: randInt
methods.description: Returns a random whole number between the two values (both ends included).
methods.keywords: rand int particles random number between both ends included chance rng roll luck

methods.name: random
methods.description: Returns a random decimal number between the two values.
methods.keywords: random particles decimal number between chance rng roll luck

methods.name: rectangle
methods.signature: particles.rectangle(Location start, Location end, double rate, ParticleDisplay display)
methods.description: Draws a filled flat rectangle of particles between two corner locations.
methods.keywords: rectangle particle shapes draws filled flat particles between corner locations effect vfx visual

methods.name: ring
methods.signature: particles.ring(double rate, double radius, double tubeRadius, ParticleDisplay display)
methods.description: Draws a ring (donut/torus) shape of particles at the display's location.
methods.keywords: ring particle shapes draws donut torus shape particles display location effect vfx visual position

methods.name: slash
methods.signature: particles.slash(double size, boolean useWideSide, ParticleDisplay display)
methods.description: Draws a sword-slash arc of particles at the display's location (useWideSide makes the wider half of the swing).
methods.keywords: slash particle shapes draws sword arc particles display location usewideside wider half swing effect

methods.name: slash
methods.signature: particles.slash(Plugin plugin, double distance, boolean useWideSide, Supplier size, Supplier speed, ParticleDisplay display)
methods.description: Draws an animated sword slash that travels forward in the display's direction over a distance.
methods.keywords: slash particle shapes draws animated sword travels forward display direction distance range

methods.name: sphere
methods.signature: particles.sphere(double radius, double rate, ParticleDisplay display)
methods.description: Draws a hollow sphere of particles at the display's location.
methods.keywords: sphere particle shapes draws hollow particles display location effect vfx visual position coords place

methods.name: spikeSphere
methods.signature: particles.spikeSphere(double radius, double rate, int chance, double minRandomDistance, double maxRandomDistance, ParticleDisplay display)
methods.description: Draws a spiky ball of particles (a sphere with random spikes sticking out) at the display's location.
methods.keywords: spike sphere particle shapes draws spiky ball particles random spikes sticking display location effect

methods.name: spread
methods.signature: particles.spread(int amount, int rate, Location start, Location originEnd, double offsetx, double offsety, double offsetz, ParticleDisplay display)
methods.description: Animates scattering lines of particles from a start point toward a randomly spread end area.
methods.keywords: spread particle shapes animates scattering lines particles start point toward randomly end area effect

methods.name: star
methods.signature: particles.star(int points, int spikes, double rate, double spikeLength, double coreRadius, double neuron, boolean prototype, int speed, ParticleDisplay display)
methods.description: Animates a spiky star burst of particles at the display's location.
methods.keywords: star particle shapes animates spiky burst particles display location effect vfx visual position coords

methods.name: structuredCube
methods.signature: particles.structuredCube(Location start, Location end, double rate, ParticleDisplay display)
methods.description: Draws only the edges (wireframe) of a cube of particles between two corner locations.
methods.keywords: structured cube particle shapes draws edges wireframe particles between corner locations effect vfx visual

methods.name: tesseract
methods.signature: particles.tesseract(double size, double rate, double speed, long ticks, ParticleDisplay display)
methods.description: Animates a rotating 4D tesseract of particles at the display's location for a number of ticks.
methods.keywords: tesseract particle shapes animates rotating 4d particles display location number ticks effect vfx visual

methods.name: vortex
methods.signature: particles.vortex(int points, double rate, int lifetime, ParticleDisplay display)
methods.description: Animates a spinning vortex of spreading particles at the display's location for a number of ticks.
methods.keywords: vortex particle shapes animates spinning spreading particles display location number ticks effect vfx visual

methods.name: waveFunction
methods.signature: particles.waveFunction(double extend, double heightRange, double size, double rate, ParticleDisplay display)
methods.description: Draws a wavy rippling surface of particles at the display's location.
methods.keywords: wave function particle shapes draws wavy rippling surface particles display location effect vfx visual

methods.name: withDirection
methods.description: Sets the direction a particle display points in.
methods.keywords: direction particles sets particle display points effect vfx visual

methods.name: withLocation
methods.description: Sets the location where a particle display will be drawn.
methods.keywords: location particles sets where particle display drawn position coords place spot effect vfx visual

bindings.name: values
bindings.description: Constant and value helpers usable as method arguments.

methods.name: value
methods.description: Turns a piece of text into its real type (number, true/false, or text) automatically.
methods.keywords: variables turns piece text type number true false automatically

methods.name: variable
methods.description: Reads a script variable that is currently available by its name.
methods.keywords: variable variables reads script currently available name data store save nbt persist title display

bindings.name: api
bindings.description: ItemsCore API accessors usable from actions.

methods.name: getInput
methods.description: Returns the helper used to ask a player for typed chat input.
methods.keywords: input players helper ask player typed chat user person

methods.name: getItemByName
methods.description: Finds one of your custom items by its name, or nothing if no item has that name.
methods.keywords: name finds custom nothing title display label special

methods.name: getItemName
methods.description: Returns the custom name of an item stack.
methods.keywords: name custom stack title display label special

methods.name: getPlayerStat
methods.description: Returns a player's live total for a stat: its base value plus the stat from every held, worn, off-hand and talisman item (reforges included). Use it to calculate damage or feed another plugin.
methods.keywords: stat total player live held worn armor offhand talisman reforge base damage

methods.name: getPlayerStats
methods.description: Returns all of a player's live total stats as a map of stat name to value.
methods.keywords: stat totals player live map all held worn talisman

methods.name: giveItem
methods.description: Gives a player one of your custom items.
methods.keywords: player custom user person special

methods.name: isUsingVault
methods.description: Checks whether the Vault economy plugin is installed and available.
methods.keywords: vault economy checks whether plugin installed available

methods.name: recalculatePlayerStats
methods.description: Forces an immediate recalculation of a player's live total stats. Call it right before reading a stat if you need a value that reflects a change made this same tick.
methods.keywords: stat recalculate refresh player live update now

methods.name: tryGetItemFromPlayerHand
methods.description: Returns the custom item a player is holding, or nothing if it is not an ItemsCore item.
methods.keywords: try player hand custom holding nothing itemscore user person special

triggers.name: leftAction
triggers.when: A player left-clicks while holding the item.

triggers.name: leftSAction
triggers.when: A player sneaks and left-clicks while holding the item.

triggers.name: rightAction
triggers.when: A player right-clicks while holding the item.

triggers.name: rightSAction
triggers.when: A player sneaks and right-clicks while holding the item.

triggers.name: shiftAction
triggers.when: A player starts sneaking while holding or wearing the item.

triggers.name: dropAction
triggers.when: A player drops the item (the drop is cancelled).

triggers.name: onItemEquip
triggers.when: A player selects the item in their hotbar.

triggers.name: armorEquipEvent
triggers.when: The item (armor) is put on.

triggers.name: armorUnEquipEvent
triggers.when: The item (armor) is taken off.

triggers.name: swapAction
triggers.when: A player swaps hands (F key) with the item.

triggers.name: shootAction
triggers.when: A player shoots a projectile while holding the item.

triggers.name: pickupAction
triggers.when: A player picks the item up off the ground.

triggers.name: arrowLandAction
triggers.when: An arrow shot while holding the item lands.

triggers.name: onConsumeAction
triggers.when: A player finishes eating or drinking the item.

triggers.name: damageEvent
triggers.when: You hit something while holding this item (the on-attack trigger). Use the variable 'attacker' for yourself (the holder) and 'victim' for what you hit - there is NO 'player' variable here.

triggers.name: projectileHitEntityEvent
triggers.when: A custom projectile from this item hits an entity.

triggers.name: projectileHitBlockEvent
triggers.when: A custom projectile from this item hits a block.

triggers.name: playerMoveEvent
triggers.when: A player moves while holding or wearing the item.

triggers.name: playerDamageEvent
triggers.when: The holder or wearer of this item takes damage. 'player' is the one being hurt; 'cause' / 'causeName' is the damage cause and 'damage' is the amount.

triggers.name: intervalAction
triggers.when: Runs again and again on a timer (set the period in ticks, 20 = 1s) for as long as the item is held or worn. Great for auras, passive particles, or keeping a potion effect topped up.

events.name: customEvents
events.description: User-defined events created in the editor. Each exposes its own variables; see the custom event definition.

variables.name: item
variables.when: Always available (the custom item this action belongs to).

variables.name: event
variables.when: Always available (the Bukkit event; cancel with core.cancelEvent(event)).
